name: Hotjar
description: Hotjar is a behavior analytics and user feedback platform. View heatmaps, session recordings, survey responses, and feedback to understand how users interact with your website.

capabilities.name: sites_list
capabilities.description: List all sites configured in the Hotjar account.

capabilities.name: sites_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a specific site.

capabilities.name: heatmaps_list
capabilities.description: List heatmaps showing click, move, and scroll patterns.

capabilities.name: heatmaps_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed heatmap data for a specific heatmap.

capabilities.name: recordings_list
capabilities.description: List session recordings with filtering by date and attributes.

capabilities.name: recordings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific session recording.

capabilities.name: surveys_list
capabilities.description: List all surveys for a site with response counts.

capabilities.name: surveys_get_responses
capabilities.description: Retrieve responses for a specific survey.

capabilities.name: feedback_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve incoming feedback widget responses with ratings and comments.

capabilities.name: feedback_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific feedback response.
